case_title: AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY VS. CENCO, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2015 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUN-29-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PANFILA ARMAS--FOREMAN. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DARREN KUY KENDALL--ESTIMATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENCO, INC. $270.40 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $420.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
